name: Smartarget Whatsapp - Contact Us
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Smartarget.online", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://smartarget.online/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://smartarget.online/page_contact.html", "children": [{"text": "contact Smartarget.online"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the Smartarget WhatsApp - Contact Us add-on you can add a small icon on the bottom-right corner of your website with your phone number and short message, such as Contact us or Message us. When the user clicks on the icon a WhatsApp tab will open for web and chat with you."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Help customers to approach the seller in the most convenient way"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Allow sellers to communicate special deals, shipping information and more"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Exit popup - prevent users from leaving the website"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "FAQ - show FAQ on every page so users gain more trust in the website"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Smartarget WhatsApp - Contact Us Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-sitejabber-add-on"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Support & Live Chat section find the "}, {"text": "Smartarget WhatsApp - Contact Us", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be redirected to the Smartarget dashboard to authenticate or create your account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://smartarget.online/neto.php", "children": [{"text": "Smartarget guide"}]}, {"text": " to configure the add-on settings.."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Save settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " to apply your changes."}]}]}]}]
